{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603230251226A63FBD2FEE58AC3F9C6"}"},"total":140},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7610745860343956286","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"一句话概括，一个普通的跑腿小哥获得五星好评就可以复制评论人的技能。他到底遇到了哪些不一样的订单和客户，又获得了哪些意想不到的技能？整个小说围绕着主线娓娓道来，吸引着读者一直读下去。是一篇值得一看的好文哦～"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1772017169,"group_id":"7604663941175725081","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N3hjfg3bkSwi+Jb8FQkq1JE=","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-0000/3abe6a50e39b4bf1ba7c29f33074e1a8~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776788850&x-signature=sYCOa%2F9ZxoTl7Yne0kWtutXwoT0%3D","user_id":"967158093070760","user_name":"爱吃包谷稀饭的封岚"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"967158093070760","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":8,"fan_ranklist_title":"小侯","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7604663941175725081","book_info":{"abstract":"（评分刚出，正在涨）本书又名《跑腿小哥，爱好有亿点点多》
————————————————————————————
大学毕业即失业。
陈丰不愿意回家待业让父母难受，选择在成都当跑腿小哥。
不久，陈丰发现顾客的五星好评可以让他复制顾客的一项能力。
“跑腿是我的职业，其他都是我的爱好。”取得各种成就的陈丰谦虚地说。
身为跑腿小哥，爱好有亿点点多，不过分吧？
【备注：技能与才艺等级分为1-7级，1级初窥门径，2级登堂入室，3级熟能生巧，4级融会贯通，5级炉火纯青，6级出神入化，7级技近乎道。单个五星好评可复制5级及以下能力，10个五星好评可升级5级能力到6级能力，100个五星好评可升级6级能力到7级能力。】","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/60c58c4af9a363d0dd70762b406200a4","author":"笑君侯","author_id":"","book_id":"7604663941175725081","book_name":"这个跑腿小哥十项全能","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#d8b088","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"7.1万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":262,"name":"都市脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=262&name=都市脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1,"name":"都市","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1&name=都市&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":75,"name":"外卖","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=75&name=外卖&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7604670124355764761","read_count":"70203","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"409213"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"6.5","serial_count":"131","tags":"都市脑洞,都市,系统,外卖","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/5797bf6b46057638255feb4f287b694f~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779389482&x-signature=vUguGyBaTEpJqTJwtxiI88zoueQ%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"3175018821860173","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"61"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603230251226A63FBD2FEE58AC3F9C6"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读2小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":14,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":7752,"reply_count":2,"show_pv":8843},"user_action":{"author":0,"author_digg_time":1772017935,"author_reply_time"
